query: Show me all assets in classes under 'Rotating Equipment'
expected_behavior: Loads maximo-asset-hierarchy with maximo-overview as parent
Recognizes this as a CLASSIFICATION hierarchy question (not physical location hierarchy) — uses CLASSSTRUCTURE, not LOCATIONS
Maximo does NOT ship a CLASSANCESTOR closure table — uses the v_class_tree view (which materializes the recursive CTE on CLASSSTRUCTURE.PARENT) OR writes an inline recursive CTE
Joins to ASSET on classstructureid to enumerate assets in any descendant class
Does NOT conflate classification hierarchy with physical hierarchy (asset-hierarchy gotcha #5)
